message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ALLBUS 1991 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12575","justification":"German General Social Survey including social conditions, social structure, and attitudes in early 1990s Germany."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1992 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12629","justification":"Covers living conditions, social indicators, and evaluations of social developments in Germany shortly after reunification."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1994 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12522","justification":"Includes indicators on social inequality, life satisfaction, and socio‑demographic conditions in mid‑1990s Germany."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1996 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12527","justification":"Provides repeated measures of social structure, work, income, and perceived social problems in Germany in the 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1998 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12530","justification":"German population survey with detailed social indicators on living conditions, values, and political/social attitudes in 1998."},{"title":"Wohlfahrtssurvey 1993 – Einstellungen der Bevölkerung zur Sozialpolitik","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4123","justification":"National survey on welfare and social policy attitudes, capturing perceptions of social security, inequality, and living conditions in early 1990s Germany."},{"title":"Soziale Indikatoren – Lebensbedingungen und soziale Sicherung in Deutschland 1993","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12293","justification":"Dataset explicitly focused on social indicators and living conditions in Germany in 1993."},{"title":"Soziale Indikatoren – Lebensbedingungen und soziale Sicherung in Deutschland 1995","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12294","justification":"Follow‑up social indicators study on living conditions and social security in mid‑1990s Germany."},{"title":"Sozio-oekonomisches Panel (SOEP), v. 1990s waves via GESIS (e.g., 1991–1999)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/?q=Sozio-%C3%B6konomisches%20Panel%20SOEP","justification":"Longitudinal household panel with rich information on income, employment, living conditions, and social indicators in Germany throughout the 1990s; GESIS provides access and documentation for 1990s waves."},{"title":"Lebensbedingungen und soziale Sicherung in Ostdeutschland 1991/1992","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12290","justification":"Focuses on living conditions and social security in Eastern Germany directly after reunification, a key aspect of German social conditions in the early 1990s."}]}
